title: Notification delivery delays caused by autoscaler undercounting hot shard backlog
summary: Push notifications and emails were delayed for a subset of tenants. Logs showed retries and worker timeouts, but the true cause requires correlating shard-skewed queue growth with an autoscaler change that watched the wrong queue metric after a tenant migration increased load on one shard.
operational_context: A large enterprise tenant migration completed at 15:50Z and concentrated notification load onto shard 7.
The notification autoscaler deployment at 16:21Z switched from total queue depth to per-shard visible depth aggregation.
